scenarios.label: A — Do Nothing
scenarios.issuance_2025b_impact: Delayed — rating agencies require seasoning post-trigger
scenarios.narrative: Trigger breach activates early amortization; all excess spread redirects to principal paydown; $142M reinvestment capacity locked; 2025-B issuance delayed; potential negative outlook on outstanding tranches.

scenarios.label: B — Dealer Remediation
scenarios.narrative: Tighten origination for the three flagged dealers; accelerate loss mitigation on 47 loans currently 60-89 DPD. $2.1M in accelerated charge-offs this quarter, absorbed within existing provision. Preserves $142M reinvestment capacity and 2025-B timeline.

scenarios.label: C — Portfolio Substitution
scenarios.narrative: Replace highest-risk dealer-originated loans with performing collateral from the retained portfolio. Structural option under the deal documents; requires trustee approval and rating agency notification.
